environment.suites: builder-journey 7/7 (blocked-until-contract, advances-once-bound, forged-binding-stays-blocked, corrupt-receipt-blocked, salon-fixture-validates, view-reports-needs), schemas parse + validate, typecheck:public exit 0, zero new runtime deps
